title: Hiding Subitem Rows in Shared Broadcast view (ability also adjust permissions, user views)
excerpt:

posts.author: elisegan24 (Elise)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I know that currently you can hide Subitem Columns and adjust views and permissions however, I would like to see the ability to hide entire Subitem Rows and adjust the visibility/permissions for Rows. I would like to share the link to the Shared view of the board to allow for clients to see Main items in the Groups but not see the Subitems below each Main item.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like greater functionality and control when it comes to permissions and visibility of these details of the board to ensure when we share timelines with Guests and Clients, we are providing them a true overview of the timeline without bombarding them with details that only our internal team utilizes.
